name: Speedy Cash
description_short: Speedy Cash offers payday loans up to $425, title loans up to $4,000, and lines of credit with in-store approval and same-day funding at the Memphis Summer Ave location.
description_long:
Speedy Cash is a storefront lending company operating multiple locations across the South, including the Memphis, Tennessee location on Summer Avenue. The company specializes in short-term emergency lending products designed for consumers needing rapid access to cash. Founded on the premise that "Tomorrow can be payday," Speedy Cash combines traditional payday lending with collateral-based title loans and flexible lines of credit to serve customers in immediate financial need.

The company offers three primary loan products: Payday Loans up to $425 with repayment due on the borrower's next paycheck, Lines of Credit up to $4,000 that allow flexible draws against an approved limit, and Title Loans up to $4,000 secured by vehicle collateral. Beyond lending, Speedy Cash provides ancillary money services including check cashing, money orders, wire transfers, and Green Dot Visa Debit Card services. The Memphis Summer Ave location operates extended hours (9am-7pm Monday and Friday, 9am-6pm Tuesday-Thursday, 9am-4pm Saturday, closed Sunday), with both in-store and online application options available.

Speedy Cash distinguishes itself through in-person customer service and rapid approval processes. The company emphasizes transparency about loan terms before application, allows customers to ask questions throughout the signing process, and provides immediate funding upon approval. The availability of multiple loan types under one roof—from small payday loans to larger title loans—allows customers to select products matching their specific needs. The company also operates a broad regional footprint with multiple Memphis-area locations, providing convenient physical access.

However, potential borrowers should recognize that payday and title loans carry inherently high costs through fees and interest rates, though specific APR figures are not disclosed on the website. The short repayment terms (especially for payday loans) can create debt cycles for consumers unable to repay on schedule. Title loans carry the risk of vehicle repossession. While Speedy Cash offers faster alternatives to traditional bank loans, these products are most appropriate for true emergencies rather than ongoing financial solutions, and consumers should carefully review all terms before borrowing.
pros: Multiple loan types available in one location—payday loans, lines of credit, and title loans up to $4,000
Extended weekday hours (9am-7pm Monday and Friday) accommodate working consumers
Same-day or next-day funding available for approved applicants
In-store staff provides personalized guidance through application process and can answer questions
Online application option available for customers preferring remote application
Transparent disclosure of loan terms and costs before signing agreement
Additional money services including check cashing, wire transfers, and money orders available in-store
cons: Payday loan maximum of $425 is very small and may not cover larger emergencies
Specific APR, fees, and interest rates not disclosed on website, making true cost comparison difficult
Short repayment terms (especially payday loans due on next paycheck) can trap borrowers in debt cycles
Title loans require vehicle collateral with repossession risk if payment is missed
Limited to in-person applications at physical store locations for most comprehensive service
best_for: Workers facing unexpected expenses between paychecks who can repay within weeks
Vehicle owners needing $1,000-$4,000 quickly who can secure the loan with car title
Consumers needing flexible borrowing through a line of credit for variable expenses
Unbanked or underbanked individuals seeking immediate cash without traditional bank loan approval
diagnosis: Speedy Cash is best for employed individuals with steady income facing immediate cash needs who can repay within weeks or who have vehicle equity to leverage. The critical caveat is that payday and title loans carry high effective costs and short terms that can create debt dependency; these should be used only for true emergencies, not ongoing financial management, and borrowers must carefully review all fees and terms before committing.
services: Green Dot Visa Debit Card services
In-store loan applications with staff assistance
Vehicle appraisal for title loan qualification
